overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos. The character proceeds along a sidewalk beside a parking structure, pauses beneath a highway overpass, then crosses a wide urban intersection featuring classical and modern architecture under bright midday sun.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past a chain-link fence and multi-story parking garage

entered.detail: tall metal chain-link fence running along the sidewalk edge
large tree with yellow-green foliage casting shadows on the pavement
multi-level parking structure with geometric window patterns
low red brick wall at the base of the tree planters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence and a concrete parking garage. Yellow-leaved trees provide sparse shade as the camera follows steadily from behind.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still near the overpass
moving into the shadow beneath the large concrete highway overpass

agents.ego_description: standing still on the sidewalk under the overpass, looking around while the camera rotates around the character

notable_agents.action: red commercial delivery truck driving past the intersection under the overpass

entered.detail: large elevated concrete highway casting shadows over the street
thick cylindrical column with yellow painted base supporting the overpass
tall pole with traffic signals showing red light

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking and stands beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The camera pans around the stationary figure, revealing traffic lights and support pillars while vehicles pass by on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: waiting at the corner for the traffic light to change before crossing
stepping off the curb and beginning to cross the wide multi-lane intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide asphalt intersection toward the classical stone building on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street in the opposite direction
white sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for the light

entered.detail: imposing neoclassical building with stone columns and pediment facade
white painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
tall contemporary glass and steel office tower rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks to the intersection corner and waits briefly before crossing the wide street. The camera follows as the character traverses the crosswalk toward a grand classical bank building with stone columns, while modern skyscrapers and palm trees line the distant streetscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban corridor that transitions from a confined industrial sidewalk to a wide, open city intersection. It begins by trailing a character walking past a concrete parking garage and chain-link fence, shaded by sparse yellow-leaved trees. As the character comes to a halt, the camera pans around them to reveal the massive concrete pillars of a highway overpass and the flow of nearby street traffic. The scene then shifts as the character moves toward the corner and crosses a wide street, with the camera following them across the crosswalk. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a grand classical bank building with stone columns set against a backdrop of modern skyscrapers and palm trees.
